/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/MainFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/ProjectFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/core/SerialComm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/HandshakeDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/daq_capstone.dir/src/ui/LEDPanel.cpp.o -o daq_capstone  /usr/lib/libserialport.so -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2
